'''Jafer Torles''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]], Torles resided on [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] as he watched over the [[Prackla sector/Legends|Prackla sector]] for thirty standard years.

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] sometime after his birth in [[94 BBY/Legends|94 BBY]], Jafer Torles was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After years of study at the academy and later as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Torles constructed for himself a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. A fully ranking [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Torles pursued the path of the [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinel]], and after years of independent study was appointed as [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Watchman]] of the [[Prackla sector/Legends|Prackla sector]] in [[51 BBY/Legends|51 BBY]].<ref name="HOC" />

[[File:Battle_of_Cartao.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Jafer Torles fought in the [[Attack on Cartao]].]]

Residing on [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], Jedi Torles watched over the sector and interacting with its people in order to assure that he provided for them in the best way he could to suit their needs. A mediator and local arbiter, Torles was revered by the people of the region as the ultimate Jedi, a reputation Torles disliked and tried to discourage. One such admirer, the young [[Corf Binalie]], idolized the Jedi all through his childhood. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Separatist leaders targeted Cartao. [[Attack on Cartao|Invading]] the world, Torles led the opposition forces to defend the world's [[Spaarti Creations]] facility. When the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] reinforced Jedi Torles, he joined [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Roshton]] and the double agent [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] in trying to repel the Separatists. Tragically, in the aftermath of the battle a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Republic gunship]] crashed into the main Spaarti Creations facility, destroying it and condemning the planet to economical death. When it was later learned that the Jedi Knights had apparently ordered the suicide mission, Torles found himself exiled and shunned by his old friends, including young Binalie. The old Jedi left the planet to return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], vowing to identify and track down the Jedi who had ordered the strike.<ref name="HOC" />
